results.rendered_html: rājanvat a. Governed by a just or good king (as a country, as distinguished from rājavat which simply means ‘having a ruler’); (surājñi deśe rājanvān syāttato'nyatra rājavān  Ak. ); rājanvatīmāhuranena bhūmiṃ  R. 6. 22 ;  Kāv. 3. 6.
